top_signals.title: US-Iran Clashes Lift Oil, Rate Hike Bets | Insight with Haslinda Amin 7/14/2026
top_signals.summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oil jumps 3% as U.S.-Iran ceasefire fractures; Trump's Hormuz toll plans reignite supply fears
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to impose shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: 9 nations back Ukraine’s Patriot alternative, Freyja — and want it flying in a year
top_signals.summary: Ballistic missiles are the one threat Ukraine can't stop with a weapon it makes itself.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New CrashStealer malware poses as Apple crash reporting tool
top_signals.summary: A new macOS information-stealing malware called CrashStealer pretends to be Apple's crash-reporting tool to steal credentials, keychain data, and crypto wallets. [...]

top_signals.title: Improving Hiring Trends Boost Embattled European Recruiters
top_signals.summary: European staffing companies’ better-than-feared numbers and cautiously optimistic outlook are pointing to a stabilizing labor market after years of downturn.

top_signals.title: 15% of doctors put in over 960 hours of overtime, health ministry survey finds
top_signals.summary: The results come despite yearslong efforts to address overwork in the medical industry.
